component.name: GTKCrypto
component.summary: Encrypt files and text, compute hashes, and use OpenPGP signatures

description.p: GTKCrypto encrypts files and text using authenticated encryption, computes common cryptographic hashes, compares files, and creates or verifies detached OpenPGP signatures.
New encrypted data uses the portable GTC3 format with AES-256-GCM and Argon2id. Historical GTKCrypto v1 and v2 files remain decryptable.

ul.li: Add the portable authenticated GTC3 encryption format
Prevent partial output and accidental replacement after failures
Restore safe v1 and v2 decryption compatibility
Fix hashing boundaries, Unicode paths, GPG key ownership, and background-task lifetimes
Add automated crypto, corruption, CLI, metadata, and sanitizer checks

description.p: Added parallel hashing, expected-hash verification, and drag-and-drop.
Ported the application to GTK 4 and libadwaita.
